headline: Capital One (NYSE:COF) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Financial services company Capital One (NYSE:COF) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 52.3% year on year to $15.23 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.42 per share was 3.3% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Capital One (NYSE:COF) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations

headline: Capital One Reports First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $2.2 Billion, or $3.34 Per Share
summary: MCLEAN, Va., April 21, 2026--Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) today announced net income for the first quarter of 2026 of $2.2 billion, or $3.34 per diluted common share, compared with net income of $2.1 billion, or $3.26 per diluted common share in the fourth quarter of 2025, and with net income of $1.4 billion, or $3.45 per diluted common share in the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted net income(1) for the first quarter of 2026 was $4.42 per diluted common share.

raw.headline: Capital One Reports First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $2.2 Billion, or $3.34 Per Share
raw.summary: MCLEAN, Va., April 21, 2026--Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) today announced net income for the first quarter of 2026 of $2.2 billion, or $3.34 per diluted common share, compared with net income of $2.1 billion, or $3.26 per diluted common share in the fourth quarter of 2025, and with net income of $1.4 billion, or $3.45 per diluted common share in the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted net income(1) for the first quarter of 2026 was $4.42 per diluted common share.

headline: Pre-Markets Back Up at Latest Crossroads in Iran
summary: Hopes are high for a near-term deal that would open the Strait of Hormuz and eventually have Iran give up its uranium-enrichment program.

headline: Capital One Financial Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Capital One (COF) to report Q1 earnings on April 21 with analysts expecting $4.67/share profit and $15.37B revenue. Lawsuit dismissed, stock down 0.4% on Monday. Analysts' ratings and targets: JP Morgan-Overweight, $213; Wells Fargo-Overweight, $260; Goldman Sachs-Buy, $260; Evercore ISI Group-Outperform, $222; Truist Securities-Buy, $275.
